reason: One man’s obsessive descent into isolation is mirrored in his fragmented, intimate narration.
A solitude-driven caretaker’s obsession with a remote hotel becomes a surreal psychological journey.
Obsessive artist’s camera offers unflinching closeness to creative madness and isolation.
Piano prodigy’s all-consuming dedication to music blurs reality in an isolated fervor.
Detective’s fixation on a missing woman drives a tense, internalized unraveling.
Serial-killer expert’s compulsive pursuit of patterns mirrors her own encroaching fear.
Filmmaker’s passion for pulp cinema fractures into enchanting yet unsettling self-obsession.
Priest’s spiritual obsession becomes a strictly intimate, claustrophobic study of faith.
Young couple’s murderous spree reflects their fractured psyches in brutal intimacy.
Underworld recordings provoke an addict’s obsession that warps memory and perception.
